title: Nocturne Lanterns
description: Dynamic lanterns that turn on at night and off during the day.
body:
# Nocturne Lanterns

Nocturne Lanterns is a Fabric mod that adds new lantern variants that dynamically change depending on the time of day. When it turns night, the lanterns will turn on. When dawn arrives, the lanterns will turn off.

**Imortant Note:**
Copper Lanterns are not available until version 1.21.9 of minecraft or 1.0.0+mc1.21.9 of the mod.

## Crafting Recipes
**Default Recipe**\
![GIF Showing crafting recipes for each lantern variant. Bottom middle is a daylight sensor on all recipes. One variant has iron ingots on the outside ring of slots with a torch in the middle. Another variant is the same as the previous but with a soul torch. Last variant has copper nuggets instead of iron nuggets and a copper torch instead of a normal or soul torch.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96b6c7c983391a95051420420509a3a2e99350b8.gif)

**Alternate Recipe**\
![GIF showing alternate crafting recipe. A shapeless recipe with a normal variant lantern along with a daylight detector resulting in the nocturne variant.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e94faf6ff5793ec7e2a6957f107d995606e0c21.gif)
